summary: Complete testing of Blog SEO features for iteration 23. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with SEO-friendly blog routes at /blog/:slug, proper meta tags, JSON-LD structured data, breadcrumbs, related posts, and navigation.

backend_blog_list.details: Returns 10 blog posts with all required fields including meta_description and seo_keywords

backend_blog_detail.details: Returns single post with all SEO fields, 404 for invalid slugs

frontend_blog_post_page.details: Renders with breadcrumbs, category badge, title, author, date, read time, share button, hero image, content, CTA, tags, related posts

frontend_seo_meta_tags.details: title, description, keywords, robots, og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type=article, og:url, twitter:card=summary_large_image all present

frontend_json_ld_article.details: Article schema with headline, description, image, datePublished, author, publisher, keywords

frontend_json_ld_breadcrumb.details: BreadcrumbList with 3 items: Home > Blog > Article Title

frontend_blog_section_links.details: Uses <Link to='/blog/{slug}'> instead of modals, 10 blog cards with Read More links

frontend_related_posts.details: Shows 2 related articles with working links to /blog/{slug}

frontend_404_page.details: Shows 'Article Not Found' with 'Back to Blog' button

frontend_view_all_navigation.details: Navigates back to homepage blog section

passed_tests: GET /api/blog - posts have required fields (id, slug, title, excerpt, content, image, author, category, tags, created_at)
GET /api/blog - posts have SEO fields (meta_description, seo_keywords)
GET /api/blog - posts have CTA objects (label, url)
GET /api/blog - posts sorted by date descending
All posts have valid image URLs
All posts have valid categories (travel-tips, course-guides, lifestyle)
SEO keywords contain relevant golf/mallorca terms
Frontend: Blog post page renders at /blog/:slug
Frontend: Breadcrumbs show Home > Blog > Title
Frontend: Author, date, read time visible
Frontend: Content renders with markdown-bold formatting
Frontend: Related posts section with 2 articles
Frontend: SEO meta tags set dynamically
Frontend: Homepage blog section uses links not modals
Frontend: View All Articles navigates to homepage blog section
critical_code_review_comments: BlogPostPage.jsx correctly sets all SEO meta tags dynamically using useEffect
JSON-LD schemas (Article, BreadcrumbList) are properly structured for search engines
Canonical URL correctly points to production domain (golfinmallorca.com)
Blog.jsx uses React Router <Link> for SEO-friendly navigation instead of modals
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Related posts logic correctly filters by category and fills with other posts if needed
Content renderer properly handles markdown-style bold (**text**) formatting
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - using existing BLOG_POSTS from data/partners.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog SEO features fully tested. Key routes: /blog/:slug for individual posts, /api/blog for list, /api/blog/{slug} for single post. All 10 blog slugs: best-time-golf-mallorca, top-5-courses-beginners, golf-and-gastronomy-mallorca, championship-courses-mallorca, ultimate-golf-guide-mallorca, stay-and-play-golf-packages-mallorca, art-culture-mallorca-golfers, culinary-mallorca-food-guide, cheap-golf-mallorca-budget, golf-near-palma-courses. SEO features verified: meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter cards, JSON-LD Article/BreadcrumbList schemas, canonical URLs. Key data-testids: blog-post-page, blog-breadcrumbs, blog-post-category, blog-post-title, blog-post-author, blog-post-date, blog-post-readtime, blog-post-share, blog-post-image, blog-post-content, blog-post-cta, blog-post-cta-button, blog-post-tags, blog-related-posts, blog-related-{slug}, blog-view-all, blog-404-back, blog-section, blog-card-{slug}, blog-read-{slug}.
